About Me

THE EDITOR
BEHIND THE FRAME

I'm Fahim Haider — a video editor with 3+ years of hands-on experience in short-form content and cinematic editing. I started editing as a hobby and turned it into a craft. Every frame I touch is intentional. I don't just edit videos — I craft emotions that stop people from scrolling.

From viral Instagram Reels to full brand campaigns, I've helped creators and brands grow their audience through content that actually connects. Based in Pakistan, working with clients worldwide.

3+ Years Exp.

What I Offer

MY SERVICES

01
🎬
Reels & Short Form

Scroll-stopping Instagram Reels, TikToks, and YouTube Shorts that grow your audience fast.

02
🎨
Color Grading

Cinematic color science that gives your footage a distinctive, professional look and feel.

03
✨
Motion Graphics

Dynamic text animations, logo reveals, and visual effects that elevate your brand identity.

04
🎥
Brand Films

Full-length brand videos and documentary-style content that tells your story with impact.

05
🔊
Sound Design

Music selection, audio mixing, and sound effects that make your video feel complete and powerful.

06
📱
Content Strategy

Not just editing — advising on what to shoot, how to structure, and what hooks will perform.
